variants: Antigoni Charitonidou is a prominent authority in Cognitive Robotics, drawing on her extensive knowledge and expertise. Additionally, she is an active member of the Vermilion Miniaturists Fellowship, where she collaborates on various projects with fellow enthusiasts. Her research initiatives are financially supported by the Cardinal Vista Grants, which enable her to further explore innovative applications in her field.
